case_title: PATEL, DIPAK R. vs. JACKSON, ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, ANTHONY GRAHAM, MARY
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, ANTHONY GRAHAM, MARY

#8/624, JUDGE DOUGLASS, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON SETTLEMENT ON RECORD, ALL PARTIES PRESENT AND ALL PARTIES IN PROPRIA PERSONA. COURT GIVES JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS FOR RESTITUTION OF 34- 6TH ST. #104, S.F. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. WRIT MAY IMMEDIATELY ISSUE BUT EXECUTION IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF AGREEMENT, AT WHICH POINT IT WILL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED & THE CASE DISM W/PREJ. DEFTS TO PAY TO TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, FOR FORWARDING TO PLTF A TOTAL OF $1433.48, AS FOLLOWS: $625. ON 3-3-98, $125 ON 3-16-98; $625 ON THE 3RD & $125 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF DEFTS FAIL TO COMPLY, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON PLTF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. ALL CLAIMS WAIVED.L
